meta.title: Support us — Yog-Scope
meta.description: Ways to support Yog-Scope: spread the word, send feedback, or sponsor the project.

header.title: Help us keep going.
header.lead: Yog-Scope is built and maintained independently. If you find the project useful, there are a few ways to help. None of them require much, and at this stage visibility and feedback matter as much as anything else.

makeKnown.shareText: Yog-Scope — open source real-time observation of Meteora liquidity pools on Solana.

star.title: Star the repository
star.body: A GitHub star takes one click, costs nothing, and helps other developers find the project. It is the simplest signal that the project is worth attention.

share.title: Spread the word
share.body: If you know people who work with Solana, DeFi, or liquidity analytics, a quick share goes a long way. At this stage, visibility is the most useful contribution.

feedback.title: Send feedback
feedback.body: Bug reports, feature ideas, or just a quick note about what works and what doesn't — all of it is welcome and shapes what gets built next. For technical issues, GitHub is the most efficient channel; for anything else, email works.

sponsor.title: Sponsor the project
sponsor.body: If you want to support Yog-Scope financially, GitHub Sponsors and direct Solana donations are both available.
sponsor.fundsNote: Funds go toward infrastructure costs (hosting, RPC quota) and ongoing development. The project remains open source and the public dashboard remains free.
